name: The Great Coliseum
descriptionSeed: Champions of every Reach, in ritual contest, for entertainment and wealth and prestige — and the whole world watches. This is where a Blazeborn and an Umbral can face each other and NOT annihilate each other, because here it is a game with rules and an audience, and both walk out. The Coliseum is the center's genius: it takes the thing that would otherwise be a war and makes it a spectacle people pay to see. It is also, obviously, a war being held very carefully in a bottle.
encounterFlavor: Champions of the twenty-four; bookmakers who know the odds across every axis; a fighter who has stopped being able to tell contest from war.
questSeeds: A contest is going to become a real killing and everyone can feel it
A champion has been asked to throw a bout, and the person asking represents their entire people
